description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a dark camouflage paint scheme, featuring angular lines and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with no visible winglets, and the aircraft has a pair of engines mounted on either side of the fuselage near the rear. The tail section is equipped with a conventional tail design, including a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely accommodating two seats in tandem. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible beneath the wings.
description: A dark camouflage military jet with swept mid-mounted wings, twin rear engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit. It features a conventional tail and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the tricycle landing gear with the nose wheel extended.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the twin engine nacelles, swept wings, and the single vertical stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the tail section, engine placement, and the angular camouflage pattern on the wings and fuselage.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the cockpit canopy, wing sweep, and the main landing gear under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on either side of the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely tandem seating.
